2605.20233.title: AI-Assisted Competency Assessment from Egocentric Video in Simulation-Based Nursing Education
2605.20233.paper_summary: Assessing learner competency in clinical simulation requires expert observation that is time-intensive, difficult to scale, and subject to inter-rater variability. Vision-language models have emerged as a promising tool for understanding complex visual behavior. In this work, we investigate whether visual observations can provide educationally meaningful signals for competency assessment through a three-stage framework that (1) extracts action timelines from egocentric nursing simulation video using frozen visual encoders and few-shot learning, (2) derives sequence-level features and per-session recognition metrics, and (3) relates these to instructor-rated competency. Across 22 densely annotated sessions (3.8 hours, 493 actions), a frozen DINOv2 backbone with HMM Viterbi decoding achieves 57.4% MOF in leave-one-out 1-shot recognition. Surprisingly, we observe a negative trend between recognition accuracy and competency (rho = -0.524, p = 0.012 for mIoU), robust to six confound controls: more competent students produce diverse, harder-to-classify workflows, while simple sequence features show no such relationship. Per-item analysis identifies patient safety protocols and team communication as the expected behaviors most reflected in this pattern, and process model comparisons reveal that higher-competency students exhibit more protocol-consistent action transitions. These findings suggest that recognition accuracy may complement predicted action timelines as a pedagogically informative signal in automated competency assessment.
2605.20233.paper_summary_zh: 評估學習者在臨床模擬中的能力需要專家的觀察，這是一個耗時的過程，難以擴展，並且受到評分者之間變異性的影響。視覺-語言模型已經成為理解複雜視覺行為的有前景的工具。在本研究中，我們探討視覺觀察是否可以通過一個三階段框架提供具有教育意義的能力評估信號，該框架包括 (1) 使用凍結的視覺編碼器和少量學習從自我中心的護理模擬視頻中提取行動時間線，(2) 推導序列級特徵和每次會議的識別指標，以及 (3) 將這些與教師評分的能力相關聯。在22個密集標註的會議中（3.8小時，493個行動），使用HMM Viterbi解碼的凍結DINOv2骨幹在留一法1-shot識別中達到了57.4%的MOF。令人驚訝的是，我們觀察到識別準確率與能力之間存在負相關趨勢（rho = -0.524，p = 0.012，針對mIoU），這一結果在六個混淆控制下仍然穩健：更有能力的學生產生多樣化且更難分類的工作流程，而簡單的序列特徵則沒有顯示出這種關係。逐項分析確定患者安全協議和團隊溝通是這一模式中最反映的預期行為，而過程模型比較顯示高能力學生表現出更符合協議的行動轉換。這些發現表明，識別準確率可能作為自動化能力評估中的教學信息信號，補充預測的行動時間線。
2605.20233.author: Hanchen David Wang et.al.
2605.20233.authors: Hanchen David Wang, Yilin Liu, Madison J. Lee, Surya Chand Rayala, Gautam Biswas, Daniel T. Levin, Meiyi Ma
